review_criteria: Verify git show strictly matches the execution result artifact.
Verify the implementation changes are limited to creating 'tasks/v0.7-m3-a-feedback-taxonomy.md'.

Verify the markdown file explicitly defines the taxonomy of failures, how feedback is ingested from physical artifacts, the retrospective artifact model, and the strict rules (e.g., 3-retry threshold) for distinguishing a normal retry from an escalated improvement-case.
Verify NO implementation of automation scripts or automatic retries occurred.
Verify NO rewriting of the governance/review mechanism occurred.
Verify NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state semantics occurred.
Verify artifact changes are strictly limited to allowed_artifacts.
